tags.tag: Chapter separator aphorism: "Obedience brings peace." Marnette breaks obedience (enters the Archive, discovers the truth). Peace is replaced by knowledge—and knowledge brings turmoil. She and Elara have chosen disruption over submission.
Marnette wakes clutching documents; physical disorientation sets tone.
Memory slams back; immediate dread.
Rapid recap of Archive revelations and incriminating signatures.
Elom carving as shattered icon; faith reframed as engineered lie.
Washes up; faces programmed lifespan and remaining years.
Rhetorical spiral: what is time for, now that she knows?
Mirror moment: identity shifts from servant to engineered unit.
Confirms lifelong objectification, even when she believed.
Habitual prayer rises automatically, showing deep conditioning.
Prayer chokes off; words become painful accusations.
Collapse and grief: worldview destroyed, betrayal embodied.
Self-condemnation for worshipping enslaver and thanking chains.
Full-body mourning for deception and stolen deaths.
Reframes her caregiving as complicity in the lie.
Mourns the old Marnette; new self must form.
Aftermath: documents on floor; scale of centuries-long crime.
Re-hides evidence; dresses on autopilot.
Decision to move through the world despite unreality.
Corridors re-seen as designed limitation and control.
Summarizes perception flip: divine design to coercive architecture.
Sees fellow salves as ticking shutdowns; collective tragedy.
Impulse to awaken others, urge to shout truth.
Realizes belief resists evidence; recalls her own denial.
Dining hall reveals 'optimized' nutrition and routine.
Isolation beat: can't eat; feels system everywhere.
Articulates horror of belief-based control over brute force.
Lena's call interrupts the spiral.
Introduces Lena as innocent friend; contrast and stakes.
Lena observes Marnette's exhaustion; concern voiced.
Marnette offers partial truth: sleeplessness and bad dreams.
Lena misattributes it to Frost's death; empathy.
Internal correction: the real haunting images are documents.
Evasive reply keeps secret intact.
Lena comforts, then pivots to Thomas problem.
Recalls Thomas as natural doubter; foreshadows conflict.
Prompt for details about Thomas.
Lena reports Thomas escalating: doubts, refusal to pray.
Marnette resonates; physical tightness mirrors her own break.
Lena presses for Marnette's influence; suspicion grows.
Marnette's guilt: she lit a fuse unknowingly.
Admits advising autonomy and questions.
Lena warns refusal is dangerous; community fear introduced.
Explains escalation path: counseling to monitoring to isolation.
Connects to 'outlier' protocols; system's management tools.
Marnette asks what Lena expects of her.
Lena begs her to steer Thomas back to faith.
Irony-laden phrase: 'peace with Elom's design' repeats.
Marnette sees Lena asking her to become control mechanism.
Internal refusal: she cannot lie Thomas back into chains.
But truth to Lena is too risky and shattering, for now.
Compromise: agrees to talk, warns doubts lack easy answers.
Lena relieved; reinforces Marnette's role as helper.
Lena leaves to hydroponics; system hums on.
Marnette watches; weight imagery and Mars-domes pressure.
Backstory bond with Lena deepens emotional cost.
Dilemma: Lena might believe or betray her.
No safe answer; tension locked in.
Empty church setting; quiet hum amplifies inner conflict.
Mosaics reinterpreted as propaganda, not sacred history.
Motivation muddled: habit, test, grief, nowhere else.
Approach to altar; iconography framed as control.
Contemplates Elom/Elon and founder culpability ambiguity.
Documents don't clarify; blame shifts to maintainers like Frost.
Kneels in confrontation; beads show lingering conditioning.
Starts prayer; name now human, not divine.
Words fail; prayer feels like confession of oppression.
Deconstructs 'designed for purpose' as literal engineering.
Deconstructs 'roles' as cages and enforced mortality.
Deconstructs 'joy' as gratitude for murder.
Says 'No' aloud; turning-point declaration.
Rises with deep anger; cage bars finally visible.
Direct accusation: centuries of lies and manufactured faith.
Touches carving; acknowledges beauty and human complicity.
States bluntly: it's a tool of control.
Invokes grandmother's faith-filled death; emotional indictment.
Temptation to smash symbol; restraint.
Insight: fists won't fix it; truth must.
Leaves altar; symbolic exit from old faith/self.
Final look back at mosaics; farewell beat.
Vow to tell others; sets mission and forward plot.
Steps into corridor; new path begins.
Thomas waiting outside; pressure and urgency.
Thomas cites Lena's framing: 'peace with doubts'.
Marnette sizes him up; sees her past in him.
Invites him in, rejects 'peace' premise.
Thomas's hope rises; intimacy of secret forms.
Secures room, produces folder; point of no return.
Names his questions and the warnings he's received.
Thomas describes pressure and prayer-as-lie feeling.
Validates him; lays out documents; truth starts.
Thomas hesitates between confusion and hope.
Explains Frost's Archive and how she found evidence.
Thomas reads; horror dawns fast.
Key shock voiced: they engineered salves to die.
Explains entire system: lifespan and religion co-designed.
Thomas overwhelmed; disbelief voiced.
Marnette confirms truth and shares her own denial arc.
Silence beat; suspense before reaction.
Relief, not despair: Thomas feels vindicated.
Shared recognition bonds them; Marnette's tears change flavor.
Thomas asks for action; rebellion seed.
Marnette cautions: denial, danger, consequences.
Thomas proposes strategy: recruit doubters, grow quietly.
Marnette notes Thomas's rapid transformation into purpose.
Moves to logistics: asks who he trusts.
Thomas offers first recruits: older workers, Petra.
Names become a map; movement feels possible.
Agrees to careful, voluntary truth-sharing approach.
Thomas raises Lena complication; emotional knot tightens.
Marnette visualizes Lena's sincere faith and fragility.
Decides 'not yet'; need strength and support first.
Thomas accepts: 'So we begin.'
They commit: quietly, person by person; truth as engine.
Repack documents reverently; emphasizes historic weight.
Sets timeline: tomorrow starts the build.
Thomas thanks her; trust solidified.
Reassures him: not crazy, awake; more will follow.
After he leaves, loneliness returns with responsibility.
Theme line: cracks spread; lies weaken once questioned.
Looks at turned-away carving; flicker of hope.
Closing beat: truth is out, and that's the beginning.
